mapper.select: SELECT cc.case_id, cc.student_id, su.real_name as student_name, cc.counselor_id, cu.real_name as counselor_name, cc.case_title, cc.case_status, cc.problem_type, cc.case_description, cc.start_date, cc.close_date, cc.total_sessions, cc.created_at, cc.updated_at FROM consultation_case cc LEFT JOIN user su ON cc.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info ci ON cc.counselor_id = ci.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user cu ON ci.counselor_id = cu.user_id WHERE cc.case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultation_case ( case_id, student_id, counselor_id, case_title, case_status, problem_type, case_description, start_date, total_sessions, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{caseId}, #{studentId}, #{counselorId}, #{caseTitle}, COALESCE(#{caseStatus}, 'ONGOING'), #{problemType}, #{caseDescription}, #{startDate}, COALESCE(#{totalSessions}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE consultation_case
case_title = #{caseTitle},
case_status = #{caseStatus},
problem_type = #{problemType},
case_description = #{caseDescription},
close_date = #{closeDate},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
